title: Fast Fatty Japanese Beef Gyudon
description: A quick and savory Japanese dish featuring fatty beef and dark rum, served in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Heat the infuse oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the dark rum, soy sauce, and sugar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 2 minutes.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the beef is cooked to desired level of doneness.
To serve, place a scoop of cooked white rice in the bottom of a Korean brass bowl.
Add the beef and sauce on top of the rice.
Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds.
